description: Read-only quality check of a poster PDF: reports page dimensions (with standard-size detection), page count, file size, font embedding, and image inventory using poppler utilities.
rules: read-only: inspects the PDF, mutates nothing
uses pdfinfo / pdffonts / pdfimages when present; degrades to warnings if poppler is absent
writes a human-readable report to record_store/review.txt and always exits 0
usage: Set POSTER_PDF (path to the poster .pdf). Output: review.txt (the quality-check report).
limitation: Full checks (page size, fonts, images) require poppler tools (pdfinfo/pdffonts/pdfimages); absent them, the report still prints the manual-inspection checklist. Does not open or repair the PDF.
